lore.english:
Taimanin. After graduating from Gosha Academy, she's always been participating in missions, especially those involving infiltration. Despite being emotional, she surprises other Taimanins because her fighting style is so different from her personality.

She's interested in music-related events and festivals. 

She's a Sound artist who can play different notes with various effects. Not only is she able to toy with her target's emotions by making them happy or sad, but she can also make them hallucinate. Her attacks affect humans and demons alike. She uses wires wrapped around her wrists as her weapon to slice her enemies.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Sound Art: Arpeggio[-]
skills.description:
Attacks the enemy with a sonic wave.
Increases 1 [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&DeBuff] turn the target has by 1 turn.
skills.description_readable:
Attacks the enemy with a sonic wave.
Increases 1 [&Common_Word_Skill_Random] [&DeBuff] turn the target has by 1 turn.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Sound Art: Crescendo[-]
skills.description:
Attacks [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] by firing a sharp sonic wave.
Target hit is inflicted with [&BuffBlock] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1170203]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1170203] turn(s)
If the target already has [&BuffBlock], additionally inflicts [&PassiveSkillBlock].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1170202] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Sound Art: Dolce[-]
skills.description:
Heals allies with beautiful melodies.
Grants [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1170301]%)[-] [&HealTurn] to [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] whose [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]30%[-].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1170301] turn(s)
Then restores [&HP] of [&Common_Word_Skill_AllyAll] by [&Color_Cyan][V3:1170302]%[-] of their Max. [&HP]
